<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/setup/status"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the current setup state for FTUE (First-Time User Experience) flow. This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}

>
